schema.description: Living metric catalog. Living means the shared definition is updated as the team learns.

<metric_name>.name: Human-readable metric name.
<metric_name>.definition: Exact calculation rule, including numerator, denominator, filters, time window, and edge cases.
<metric_name>.sourceOfTruth: Official system, report, or table used to verify this metric.
<metric_name>.owner: Person or team accountable for approving definition changes.
<metric_name>.format: Unit or display format, such as USD, percent, count, days, or ratio.
<metric_name>.notes: Optional context, caveats, approval notes, or related dashboard links.
<metric_name>.createdAt: ISO-8601 timestamp written when the metric is first added.
<metric_name>.updatedAt: ISO-8601 timestamp written when the metric is last changed.
